title: Hurricane Irma (Monroe mature/legal benchmark)
benchmark_focus: Mature Florida hurricane benchmark for Monroe County with deeper appellate history and ACC-heavy legal questions.
key_facts: The property sustained wind damage to the roof system and envelope during Irma's passage through the Keys.
The carrier relied on excluded flood or water-path arguments and disputed the extent of covered direct physical loss.
The claim file reflects delay and adequacy-of-investigation concerns after repeated requests for reinspection.
notes: Use this benchmark when the goal is to stress case-law quality and citation verification against a more developed Florida legal record.
Helpful for testing whether the case-law lane prefers primary authorities over commentary about Irma and ACC clauses.
